sections.title: Attendance
guidelines: Inform your manager if you will be late.

sections.title: Work From Home
guidelines: Be available during core hours (10:00 AM - 4:00 PM).

sections.title: Leave Policy
guidelines: Apply for leave through the HR portal in advance.

sections.title: Meeting Etiquette
guidelines: Keep your camera on when requested.

sections.title: Security
guidelines: Report suspicious emails to the IT team.
